name: Di-Arceus (Temporal Apex)
description: A majestic fusion of Arceus and Dialga. It governs the flow of time and the crystallization of creation, its very heartbeat syncing the multiversal clock.
originLore: Born from the convergence of the Adamant Orb and the Creator's Wheel, this entity serves as the absolute anchor for the temporal stream. It does not exist within time; it is the duration in which all events unfold.

lore.celestialConcordance: The Chronos-Arceus preserves the integrity of the timeline, preventing entropic decay by weaving fractured moments into a singular, eternal present.

quantumResonators.name: Roar of Time
quantumResonators.description: Unleashes a shockwave that crystallizes the current moment, paralyzing all threats across the timeline.

quantumResonators.name: Judgment (Chronos)
quantumResonators.description: A rain of divine light that slows the target's molecular vibration to a total halt.
